05 — Misc / Uses

Uses — Todd Libby

5

Tools & setup

The hardware, software, and tools I use day to day for development, accessibility testing, and streaming.

Editor

  • VS Code Primary
  • Vim Quick edits

Terminal

  • Ghostty
  • zsh + oh-my-zsh

Stack

  • Nuxt 4 All projects
  • Supabase Auth + DB
  • Netlify Deployment
  • TypeScript Always

Accessibility tools

  • Axe DevTools
  • ARC Toolkit
  • IBM Equal Access Checker
  • NVDA Screen reader testing
  • VoiceOver Screen reader testing

Design & misc

  • Affinity Photo
  • CodePen

Hardware

  • PC Primary machine
  • MacBook Pro 2019 Still tickin'

Primary editor

VS Code

Terminal

Ghostty

OS

Windows (primary) macOS

Node

v22

Required on all projects.
